scripts.clean: rm -rf dist src-tauri/target && echo 'Cleaned dist + Cargo target'
scripts.clean:cache: rm -rf dist src-tauri/target ~/.local/share/com.drawfinity.app/WebKitCache ~/.local/share/com.drawfinity.app/CacheStorage && echo 'Cleaned dist + Cargo target + WebKitGTK cache'
scripts.tauri:fresh: npm run clean:cache && npm run tauri dev
